creator: victor@nett.ca
text:
When copying ~>10MB files over the network, the system freezes occasionally;
for files >100MB freezes almost always; no warning messages; observed with
scp, samba, and postgres connection requiring transfer of >2M records;
systems on the other side were WinXP, Win2003, and Linux;

Hardware used is Asus M2V motherboard with amd64 dual core processor;
Attansic 1GB network card working in ndis mode and 3Com 3c905B-TX network
cards.

This behavior occurs for both interfaces; also with Attansic disabled and
other 3Com interface used instead; the motherboard is new, Adaptec RAID
controller was moved from an older system working with freebsd 6; did not
have any problems before;

appreciate your help;
below are some more listings:

How-To-Repeat: Copy a >100MB file from mounted smb share to local filesystem;
Copy a >100MB file from local filesystem using scp to remote ssh server;
